description_long: This is a rectangular wooden table with a smooth, polished surface and a rich, medium-brown finish. The tabletop is thick and solid, supported by four sturdy, straight legs positioned at each corner. The wood grain is visible across the tabletop, adding a natural and elegant touch to its appearance. The legs are simple and unadorned, with a slight taper and a matching wood finish. There are no visible drawers, handles, or decorative elements, giving the table a minimalist and functional design. This table would be suitable for use in urban environments such as parks, public seating areas, or community spaces.
description: A sturdy, rectangular wooden table with a smooth, polished brown surface and four straight legs. The design is minimalist and functional, with visible wood grain and no decorative elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the tabletop and all four legs, highlighting the table's rectangular shape and solid construction.
description_view_1: Side view emphasizing the thickness of the tabletop and the depth of the table, with two legs visible and the wood grain running lengthwise.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the tabletop and all four legs, with the same rectangular proportions and finish.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the tabletop thickness and two legs, mirroring the features seen in view 1.
